title: Final Project — C2 Portfolio
topics: all skills · C2 writing · speaking · vocabulary · grammar mastery
description: Finální projekt — ukázka všech dovedností kurzu na úrovni C1/C2. Gratulace!
notes: ✓ Express yourself spontaneously, fluently, and precisely
✓ Use a wide range of idiomatic expressions naturally
✓ Write clear, well-structured text — complex topics, controlled style
✓ Understand virtually everything heard or read
What distinguishes C1 from C2: C2 = near-native precision and range

examples.en: The argument was nuanced and well-supported by evidence.
examples.cz: Argument byl nuancovaný a dobře podložený důkazy.

examples.en: Her writing is both concise and eloquent.
examples.cz: Její psaní je zároveň stručné a výmluvné.

examples.en: He expressed his views with remarkable precision.
examples.cz: Vyjádřil svůj názor s pozoruhodnou přesností.

quiz.sentence: A C2 speaker can ___ fine shades of meaning.
Her essay was ___ — every word counted.

tasks: 1. ESSAY (300 words): 'Language learning is one of the most valuable investments a person can make.' Agree or disagree?
2. SPEECH (3 min recorded): Describe your language learning journey — what worked, what didn't, what's next.
3. REVIEW: Look back at Lesson 01. Write about how your English has changed since you started this course.
4. NEXT STEPS: Research C2 proficiency exams (CPE, IELTS 8.0+) and set a concrete goal with a date.
5. MAINTENANCE: Commit to a daily English habit — podcast, reading, writing, or speaking for 20 min/day.
